months.subtitle: January
months.info: Term start: 1 week after school starts|15 January: Submission of attendance lists for the autumn term|Officer meeting

months.subtitle: February
months.info: 1 February: Sign-up for HSBK club duties|The Viking Race|Invoicing of term fees

months.subtitle: April
months.info: Sea Scout Day|Registration fee for summer camp|Health declaration for summer camp|Booking of launch date

months.subtitle: May
months.info: 1 May: Launch of the boats|Ascension Day MAWR - Mälaren Around the World Race|Officer meeting|Final payment for summer camp|Jetty party at HSBK

months.subtitle: July
months.info: Check the boats at HSBK|At some point during the summer: Camp/squadron

months.subtitle: August
months.info: 15 August: Submission of attendance lists for the autumn term|Term start: 1 week after school starts

months.subtitle: September
months.info: Invoicing of term fees|Group assembly|Grant application to St. Göran by 30 September at the latest

months.subtitle: December
months.info: IGLOO - The Frozen Challenger Hike|End of term service in the Church|Reporting of grants from the St. Göran Committee before 31 December
